title: Define Widget Properties
text: Define Widget Properties Specify the properties of the current widget, and optionally provide the ValRep for the field. The parameters displayed are initially supplied by Uniface as default parameters for the widget, or are specified in your system initialization file. Note: Not all widgets have additional properties that can be set in this form. Example For a check box, enter TRISTATE in the Widget Parameter field and True in the Parameter Value field. Fields Widget Parameter Parameter Value Value and Representation How to Click the appropriate New or Delete buttons to add or remove a property or ValRep item. Related Links Widget Reference: Forms and Reports Widgets in Form components determine the appearance and behavior of fields, labels, occurrences, and entities in components running on Windows. Changing the Widget Type Changing the widget type creates a (local) definition of a field that deviates from the application model default. Properties for Styling the User Interface Each object that can be viewed in the user interface has a collection of properties that can be used to control what it looks like, and some other aspects of its visual behavior.
